Napping in a comfortable spot or enjoying a favorite treat.
Exploring somewhere new and bouncing around with friends.
Finding a quiet, solitary place to contemplate life's mysteries.
Reading an informative book or sharing stories from my past.
Doing small, thoughtful favors for the people I care about most.

topics.display_name: Which 'Wizard of Oz' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Follow The Yellow Brick Road To Find Out Which 'Wizard Of Oz' Character You Actually Are
synopsis.summary: Are you a natural-born leader or a dreamer looking for a bit of courage? Whether you're clicking your heels together or melting away at the sight of water, everyone has a place in the Land of Oz. Take this quiz to discover which iconic character matches your unique personality. It's time to see if you're truly the brains, the heart, or the nerve of your friend group!

characters.name: Dorothy Gale
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and loyal dreamer who values home and friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess a grounded sense of wonder and a deep-seated loyalty to those you love. When faced with unexpected challenges, you do not crumble; instead, you put one foot in front of the other, trusting that your inner compass will lead you back to where you belong. You have a knack for bringing people together, often acting as the glue that holds a diverse group of friends toward a common goal. Your strength lies in your sincerity and your refusal to let the cynicism of the world dampen your spirit. However, your longing for a better life can sometimes make you feel restless in your current surroundings. You might struggle with a sense of displacement until you realize that your power has been with you all along. Your journey is one of self-discovery, learning that the magic you seek is not in a distant land but in the connections you forge and the courage you show when things get difficult. You are the heart of your story, proving that kindness is a force of nature.

characters.name: Scarecrow
characters.short_description: You are a clever and resourceful thinker who often underestimates your own intellectual capabilities.
characters.profile_text: You are the strategist of your group, always looking for a logical way out of a sticky situation. Even when you feel like you lack the necessary tools or knowledge, your natural curiosity and quick wit allow you to solve problems that baffle others. You are humble to a fault, often crediting luck or others for the brilliant ideas that actually originated in your own mind. Your thirst for knowledge is unquenchable, and you value wisdom far more than material wealth or status. Your main pitfall is a tendency toward self-doubt and overthinking. You might spend so much time worrying about your perceived inadequacies that you fail to see how much others rely on your guidance. Once you gain confidence in your own perspective, you become an unstoppable force for good. You are a loyal companion who provides the mental clarity needed to navigate life's most confusing yellow brick roads. You prove that a sharp mind is most effective when paired with a willing spirit and a bit of self-belief.

characters.name: Tin Woodman
characters.short_description: You are a deeply empathetic and sensitive soul who prioritizes kindness and emotional connection.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your capacity for love and your desire to treat every living creature with tenderness. You are the emotional heart of your social circle, often the first to offer a shoulder to cry on or a kind word to someone in distress. You believe that the ability to feel, even if it brings pain, is the most precious gift one can possess. Your actions are guided by a strict moral code of compassion, and you go out of your way to avoid causing harm to anyone or anything. Because you are so sensitive, you can sometimes become paralyzed by your own emotions or the fear of losing your connection to others. You might worry that you are cold or unfeeling when you are actually the most caring person in the room. Your challenge is to realize that your empathy is a strength, not a vulnerability. By embracing your emotional depth, you inspire others to be more vulnerable and authentic. You show the world that having a heart is not about what you receive, but how much you are willing to give.

characters.name: Cowardly Lion
characters.short_description: You are a brave and protective individual who mistakenly believes your natural fears are a sign of weakness.
characters.profile_text: You have a big personality and an even bigger heart, though you often try to hide your anxieties behind a boisterous exterior. You are fiercely protective of your friends and will stand your ground when it truly matters, even if your knees are knocking the whole time. You value security and peace, yet you find yourself thrust into adventures that test your limits. Your true strength is not the absence of fear, but the fact that you keep moving forward despite it. You often compare yourself to an idealized version of strength, leading to feelings of inadequacy. You might feel like a failure when you should be a leader, but your humility is actually what makes you a true hero. When you stop seeking external validation for your courage and start trusting your instincts, you discover that you have always had the heart of a king. Your presence provides a sense of safety to those around you, even if you do not always feel safe yourself. You are the definition of true bravery in action.

characters.name: Glinda the Good Witch
characters.short_description: You are a wise and benevolent mentor who empowers others to find their own path through gentle guidance.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with grace and a calm authority that commands respect without the need for force. You are a natural teacher and protector, often seeing the potential in others long before they see it in themselves. You prefer to lead through inspiration and subtle nudges rather than direct intervention, believing that the most important lessons are the ones people learn on their own. Your presence is a source of comfort and stability in a chaotic world, and you use your influence to maintain balance and harmony. While your intentions are always pure, your detached and mysterious nature can sometimes make you seem unapproachable or overly cryptic. You might hold back information to let others grow, which can be frustrating for those in the midst of a crisis. However, your perspective is always focused on the long-term well-being of those you care for. You understand that true power comes from within, and your greatest joy is watching others realize their own capabilities. You are the light that guides others home.

characters.name: The Wicked Witch of the West
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and determined individual who uses your sharp intellect and ambition to command your environment.
characters.profile_text: You are a force to be reckoned with, possessing a singular focus and a drive to achieve your goals at any cost. You do not settle for mediocrity and have little patience for those who stand in your way or fail to meet your high standards. Your intelligence is formidable, and you have a talent for organization and leadership, even if your methods are unconventional or intimidating. You are fiercely independent and refuse to be ignored or sidelined by society, demanding the respect you feel you have earned. Your greatest challenge is your tendency to let bitterness or a desire for control cloud your judgment. When you feel wronged, you can become obsessed with righting that perceived slight, often losing sight of the bigger picture. Your isolation is often a result of your own defensive walls and your struggle to trust others. If you can channel your immense energy and passion into constructive outlets rather than conflict, you have the potential to be an incredibly influential and transformative figure. You are a master of your own destiny.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you are faced with a sudden, overwhelming obstacle, what is your immediate instinctive reaction?

options.text: I keep moving forward step-by-step, focusing on the ultimate goal of getting home.
I pause to analyze the situation and look for a logical, clever workaround.
I worry about how the situation affects everyone's feelings and safety.
I feel a surge of panic but stand my ground to protect those with me.
I take a step back to view the situation from a higher, more detached perspective.
I take charge immediately and demand that the obstacle be removed or bypassed.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these personal qualities do you value most in yourself and others?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty and a sense of belonging.
Intellectual brilliance and the ability to solve puzzles.
Deep empathy and a compassionate heart.
The courage to act even when you are afraid.
Wisdom and the ability to guide others toward their own power.
Ambition and the drive to command your own destiny.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your own perceived flaws or insecurities?

options.text: I focus on my responsibilities and hope my actions speak louder than my doubts.
I often feel like I'm not smart enough, despite evidence to the contrary.
I worry that I am too sensitive or that I lack the depth of feeling I should have.
I feel like a bit of a fraud and wish I were naturally bolder.
I remain calm and mysterious, keeping my vulnerabilities to myself.
I mask my insecurities with a display of power and authority.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred role when working within a group or a team?

options.text: The glue that holds the group together through shared values.
The strategist who provides the ideas and the plan.
The emotional support who ensures everyone feels cared for.
The protector who watches the group's back during a crisis.
The mentor who provides subtle guidance and lets others lead.
The decisive leader who sets the agenda and expects results.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were granted one wish by a powerful entity, what would you ask for?

options.text: To return to the place where I feel I truly belong.
The knowledge and insight to understand the world's mysteries.
The capacity to love and be loved more deeply.
The inner strength to never back down from a challenge.
The ability to help others realize their own hidden potential.
The power and influence to ensure my goals are achieved.

topics.display_name: What Kind Of Sweet Treat Matches Your Soul?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Sweet Treat Is Actually Your Soulmate?
synopsis.summary: Ever wonder if your inner vibe is more of a sophisticated dark chocolate truffle or a chaotic birthday cake pop? Your sugar cravings say more about your personality than you might think. Take this quiz to discover which sugary delight perfectly mirrors your soul's unique energy and find your true dessert match.

characters.name: Dark Chocolate Truffle
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated and intense individual who values depth and quality over superficial flash.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rich, complex personality that reveals itself slowly to those patient enough to look beneath the surface. Like a dark chocolate truffle, you are often perceived as serious or even intimidating at first glance, but this is merely a shield for your velvety, sensitive interior. You appreciate the finer things in life and prefer a few deep, meaningful connections over a wide circle of acquaintances. Your strengths lie in your unwavering loyalty and your ability to provide profound insight when others are facing difficult situations.

However, your intensity can sometimes come across as brooding or unapproachable. You might struggle with perfectionism, holding yourself and others to impossibly high standards that lead to unnecessary stress. Learning to embrace the lighter, sweeter moments of life without over-analyzing them will help you find a better balance. You are most compatible with those who respect your need for privacy and can match your intellectual depth.

characters.name: Birthday Cake Pop
characters.short_description: You are the life of the party, radiating infectious energy and a youthful spirit that brightens every room.
characters.profile_text:
You are a burst of joy and celebration, much like a colorful birthday cake pop. Your personality is defined by optimism and a genuine love for social interaction, making you the person everyone wants to have around during a celebration. You have a knack for making people feel special and included, often acting as the glue that holds your social groups together. Your spontaneity and willingness to try new things keep your life exciting and full of variety.

Because you are so focused on keeping things light and fun, you may sometimes avoid serious conversations or neglect your own deeper emotional needs. There is a risk of becoming a people-pleaser, spreading yourself too thin in an attempt to make everyone happy. Remember that it is okay to have off days where you aren't the center of attention. You thrive when paired with grounded individuals who can provide a stable foundation for your high-flying energy.

characters.name: Warm Apple Pie
characters.short_description: You are a nurturing and reliable presence, offering comfort and a sense of home to everyone you meet.
characters.profile_text:
You embody the warmth and nostalgia of a classic apple pie, serving as a pillar of strength for your friends and family. People are naturally drawn to your kind heart and your ability to listen without judgment. You find great satisfaction in tradition and the simple pleasures of life, such as a quiet evening at home or a shared meal with loved ones. Your reliability is your greatest strength; when you make a promise, you follow through with sincerity and care.

Your desire for stability can sometimes manifest as a resistance to change, causing you to stay in your comfort zone even when it no longer serves you. You might also take on too much of other people's emotional baggage, forgetting to prioritize your own self-care. Learning to set boundaries is essential for maintaining your inner peace. You are most compatible with adventurous souls who can gently nudge you toward new experiences while appreciating the safe harbor you provide.

characters.name: Zesty Lemon Bar
characters.short_description: You are a sharp-witted and refreshing individual who brings a much-needed spark of honesty to every situation.
characters.profile_text:
Just like a zesty lemon bar, you offer a perfect balance of sweetness and tartness. You aren't afraid to speak your mind or challenge the status quo, and your quick wit often leaves others both impressed and slightly on their toes. You value clarity and directness, finding little patience for sugar-coating or ambiguity. This honesty makes you an invaluable friend, as people know they can always count on you for an objective perspective and a reality check when they need it most.

Your bluntness can occasionally be mistaken for harshness, and you might inadvertently hurt the feelings of those who are more sensitive. It is important to remember that not everyone processes information with the same logical detachment that you do. Softening your delivery without losing your edge is your lifelong challenge. You pair best with resilient, confident individuals who appreciate your transparency and can handle a bit of healthy debate.

characters.name: Gourmet Macaron
characters.short_description: You are an elegant and multifaceted person who appreciates the artistry in the details of daily life.
characters.profile_text:
You are a gourmet macaron—delicate, refined, and surprisingly resilient. You have a keen eye for aesthetics and likely enjoy expressing yourself through fashion, art, or a meticulously curated environment. Your personality is layered, with different flavors that you reveal depending on the company you keep. You value grace and poise, often acting as a diplomat in tense situations because you prefer harmony over conflict. Your attention to detail ensures that everything you touch has a professional and polished finish.

Your focus on presentation can sometimes lead to a preoccupation with how others perceive you, causing you to hide your vulnerabilities. You may feel a constant pressure to appear perfect, which can be exhausting and isolating. Allowing yourself to be messy or imperfect is a vital step toward genuine connection. You are most compatible with authentic, down-to-earth people who encourage you to let your guard down and show your true, unpolished self.

characters.name: Spicy Chili Chocolate
characters.short_description: You are a bold and adventurous spirit who loves to surprise others with your unexpected depth and heat.
characters.profile_text:
You are the embodiment of spicy chili chocolate—an intriguing blend of comfort and thrill. You thrive on excitement and are always looking for the next challenge or unconventional path to take. You don't fit into a standard mold, and you take pride in your unique perspective on the world. Your passion is palpable, and when you care about something, you pursue it with a fiery intensity that inspires those around you to step out of their own comfort zones.

Your love for intensity can lead to burnout or a tendency to create drama when things feel too boring. You might struggle with routine and find it difficult to commit to long-term projects that don't offer immediate stimulation. Learning to find excitement in the mundane will help you sustain your energy over the long haul. You are most compatible with curious and open-minded partners who aren't afraid of a little heat and can keep up with your fast-paced lifestyle.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically navigate a large social gathering or party?

options.text: I am the life of the party, ensuring everyone is laughing and included.
I prefer a quiet corner for a deep, one-on-one conversation.
I act as the host or helper, making sure everyone feels comfortable and fed.
I move through the room with poise, making elegant and brief connections.
I offer sharp, witty observations to whoever is standing nearby.
I seek out the most adventurous people in the room to swap stories with.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a close friend is facing a dilemma, what is your go-to response?

options.text: I provide a blunt reality check and honest, logical advice.
I offer a warm embrace and a listening ear without judgment.
I analyze the situation deeply to provide a sophisticated solution.
I try to cheer them up with a fun activity to take their mind off things.
I help them find a diplomatic way to resolve the conflict gracefully.
I encourage them to take a bold risk and embrace the unexpected.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment makes you feel most at peace?

options.text: A cozy, sun-drenched kitchen filled with familiar scents.
A minimalist, dimly lit study perfect for introspection.
A vibrant, bustling festival surrounded by music and people.
A meticulously curated gallery or a high-end boutique.
A crisp, modern office where everything is efficient and clear.
A rugged trail or an exotic location I've never visited before.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary focus when you start a new creative project?

options.text: Ensuring every tiny detail is aesthetically perfect and polished.
Pushing boundaries and experimenting with unconventional ideas.
Creating something that brings joy and energy to others.
Building something reliable that honors a long-standing tradition.
Achieving a level of depth and complexity that few others can reach.
Finding the most direct and effective way to communicate a truth.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you handle unexpected changes to your daily routine?

options.text: I adapt quickly, seeing it as a chance for a new adventure.
I prefer to stick to what I know and might feel a bit unsettled.
I maintain my composure and adjust my plans with quiet grace.
I use my wit to find the irony or humor in the disruption.
I take it in stride, using the energy to spark a spontaneous celebration.
I retreat momentarily to analyze how the change affects my long-term goals.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Office' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Dunder Mifflin Employee Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your workplace antics lean more towards world-class pranks or accidental fire drills? Whether you're the 'World's Best Boss' or just trying to make it to 5:00 PM without a headache, your desk habits say a lot about you. Take this quiz to find out which Dunder Mifflin legend matches your professional vibe. It’s time to settle the debate once and for all!

characters.name: Michael Scott
characters.short_description: You are a well-meaning but socially awkward leader who craves connection and validation above all else.
characters.profile_text:
You possess an irrepressible need to be liked, often leading you to prioritize office camaraderie and elaborate pranks over actual productivity. Your heart is usually in the right place, but your lack of self-awareness can lead to cringe-worthy social blunders and unintentional chaos. You view your coworkers as your family, and while your management style is unconventional, your genuine passion for your job is undeniable.

Your greatest strength is your resilience and optimism, though your pitfalls include a desperate need for attention and a tendency to overpromise. You thrive when you feel like the center of the world, even if it means making a fool of yourself to get a laugh. Ultimately, you are a dreamer who wants everyone to be happy, even if you have to force them to have fun to make it happen.

characters.name: Dwight Schrute
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely loyal, rule-abiding overachiever with a penchant for survivalism and beet farming.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by an intense dedication to authority, tradition, and the pursuit of excellence in your professional life. Your work ethic is unmatched, and you take immense pride in your various titles and responsibilities, no matter how small they may seem to others. You value logic and efficiency, often coming across as rigid or eccentric to those who don't share your specific interests in martial arts, agriculture, or security protocols.

While you can be abrasive and competitive, your loyalty to those you respect is absolute. You are the person everyone turns to in a crisis, provided they can handle your blunt delivery and unconventional methods. Your pitfalls include a lack of social nuance and a tendency to take things far too seriously. You are a true original who isn't afraid to stand alone, as long as you have your farm and your sense of duty.

characters.name: Jim Halpert
characters.short_description: You are a charming, laid-back observer who uses humor and wit to navigate the monotony of daily life.
characters.profile_text:
You often find yourself playing the role of the "straight man" in a world of eccentric personalities, using your quick wit and signature smirks to cope with office boredom. You are naturally talented and likable, which allows you to succeed without appearing to try too hard. Your priorities lie in your personal relationships rather than corporate climbing, and you value a good prank or a meaningful conversation over a sales quota.

You have a romantic heart and a deep sense of loyalty to the people you truly care about. However, your tendency to coast on your natural abilities can sometimes hold you back from reaching your full potential. You prefer to stay in your comfort zone, using sarcasm as a shield, but when you finally commit to a goal or a person, you are all in. You are the relatable heart of your group, always ready with a joke to lighten the mood.

characters.name: Pam Beesly
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted, artistic soul who is slowly finding your voice and the courage to pursue your dreams.
characters.profile_text:
You are the glue that holds your social circle together, possessing a quiet strength and a keen eye for the details that others miss. For a long time, you may have felt stuck in a routine or hesitant to speak your mind, but you are gradually learning to advocate for yourself and your creative passions. You value stability and genuine connection, and you have a unique ability to find beauty in the mundane aspects of life.

Your journey is one of self-discovery and empowerment. While you are naturally empathetic and supportive, your pitfall is a tendency to settle for less than you deserve out of fear of change. As you grow, you become more assertive, proving that your gentle nature is not a weakness but a foundation for a rich, fulfilling life. You are the person who notices the small things and makes everyone feel seen.

characters.name: Andy Bernard
characters.short_description: You are an enthusiastic, Ivy League-educated performer who masks deep-seated insecurities with song and school spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of many talents and even more nicknames, always ready to break into a capella or share a story about your time at Cornell. You crave approval and status, often trying too hard to fit in or impress your superiors with your "Nard Dog" energy. Your personality is a mix of high-strung ambition and a desperate desire for friendship, which can sometimes manifest as anger issues or over-the-top theatricality.

Beneath the blazer and the banjo, you are someone who just wants to be accepted for who you are. Your strengths include your boundless energy and your ability to commit fully to a bit or a project. However, your pitfalls involve a fragile ego and a tendency to let your emotions dictate your professional decisions. You are at your best when you stop performing and start being authentic, allowing your genuine kindness to shine through the Ivy League veneer.

characters.name: Angela Martin
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined, judgmental traditionalist who finds comfort in order, cats, and strict moral codes.
characters.profile_text:
You hold yourself and everyone around you to incredibly high standards, often expressing your disapproval through sharp glares and pointed comments. You value structure, cleanliness, and the rules of decorum, finding the antics of your more relaxed peers to be unprofessional and irritating. Your life is organized around your specific interests, particularly your devotion to your feline companions and your religious convictions.

While you may appear cold or unapproachable, you possess a hidden depth of passion and a fierce protective streak for the things you hold dear. Your pitfalls include a lack of flexibility and a tendency to be overly critical of others' lifestyles. You find security in the predictable and the traditional, and while you may not be the life of the party, you are the one who ensures that everything is done correctly and on time. You are the anchor of discipline in a chaotic world.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when you start your workday?

options.text: To be the person everyone loves and considers a friend.
To execute my duties with maximum efficiency and authority.
To get through the tasks with as much humor and as little stress as possible.
To support my colleagues and find small moments of creative beauty.
To impress my superiors and climb the social ladder.
To ensure that standards are maintained and rules are strictly followed.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when a crisis or high-stress situation occurs?

options.text: I try to lighten the mood with a joke or a clever distraction.
I immediately implement safety protocols and take command.
I seek reassurance and validation from those around me.
I keep my head down and process my observations privately.
I express my disapproval and demand that things be done correctly.
I channel my nervous energy into an enthusiastic performance or song.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward in a social group?

options.text: The entertainer who wants to keep the energy high and the group together.
The protector who values tradition, security, and hard work.
The empathetic listener who notices the small details others miss.
The cool observer who keeps everyone grounded with a smirk.
The moral compass who isn't afraid to point out when others are wrong.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in your personal life and relationships?

options.text: Spontaneity, wit, and a shared sense of humor.
Absolute loyalty and a clear sense of duty.
Deep emotional connection and being liked by everyone.
Peace, stability, and the freedom to pursue my art.
Order, cleanliness, and high personal standards.
Prestige, status, and recognition of my accomplishments.

baseline_questions.question_text: If you were given a surprise day off, how would you most likely spend it?

options.text: Planning an elaborate event to bring all my friends together.
Working on my land or practicing a practical survival skill.
Doing absolutely nothing or hanging out with my favorite person.
Visiting a gallery or working on a personal craft project.
Catching up on chores and organizing my home to perfection.
Practicing a hobby like a capella or showing off my school spirit.

topics.display_name: Which 'Stranger Things' Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Stranger Things' Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Grab your walkie-talkie and head to Hawkins, Indiana, because it's time to find out where you fit in the Party. Are you a natural-born leader with a plan for every Demogorgon encounter, or the loyal friend who always keeps the group together? This quiz dives deep into your personality to match you with your 1980s supernatural counterpart.

characters.name: Eleven
characters.short_description: You are a powerful, protective individual with a deep sense of loyalty and a mysterious past.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who values connection above all else, often because you know what it feels like to be isolated. Your strength is immense, but it comes from a place of vulnerability and a desire to protect those you love. You might struggle with social nuances or expressing your emotions in words, but your actions speak volumes about your character. You are a survivor who has faced unimaginable challenges, yet you remain capable of profound empathy and growth. You find beauty in the small things, like a favorite snack or a quiet moment with a friend.

Your journey is one of self-discovery, learning that your worth isn't defined by your abilities but by your heart. Sometimes your intensity can be overwhelming, and you may feel the weight of the world on your shoulders. Learning to trust others and yourself is a lifelong journey, but your resilience ensures you never face it alone. You are the ultimate protector, willing to sacrifice everything for the family you chose.

characters.name: Mike Wheeler
characters.short_description: You are the heart and the leader of your group, known for your unwavering devotion and strategic mind.
characters.profile_text:
You are a natural-born leader who isn't afraid to take charge when things get difficult. Your loyalty to your friends is your defining trait, and you will go to the ends of the earth to ensure their safety and happiness. You have a creative imagination and a knack for seeing the bigger picture, which often makes you the paladin of your social circle. You value tradition and the bonds you've built over the years, often acting as the glue that keeps everyone together. You are the one who keeps the hope alive when things look grim, reminding everyone why they are fighting in the first place.

Your passion can sometimes manifest as stubbornness or a tendency to be overly controlling when you're stressed. You might find it hard to adapt when things change or when your role in the group feels threatened. However, your commitment to your loved ones always guides you back to what matters most. You are a dreamer who believes in the power of friendship to overcome any obstacle.

characters.name: Dustin Henderson
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, tech-savvy optimist who uses logic and humor to navigate life's mysteries.
characters.profile_text:
You are the intellectual spark of your group, always ready with a scientific explanation or a clever solution to a complex problem. Your curiosity is boundless, and you approach the world with a sense of wonder and a never say die attitude. You possess a unique blend of confidence and quirkiness that makes you incredibly likable, and you aren't afraid to be exactly who you are. Whether you're building a long-range radio or befriending a strange creature, you do it with enthusiasm and a sharp wit. You are a natural mediator who uses humor to diffuse tension and keep the peace.

Your curiosity can sometimes lead you into trouble, and your desire to be right might occasionally clash with others' perspectives. You might get frustrated when others don't see the logic in your plans, but your diplomatic nature and genuine kindness usually help you smooth over any conflicts. You are a true original, proving that being a nerd is actually a superpower.

characters.name: Lucas Sinclair
characters.short_description: You are a pragmatic, brave, and grounded individual who prioritizes logic and the safety of your team.
characters.profile_text:
You are the voice of reason in your group, often the first to question a risky plan or point out a practical flaw. You value hard work, discipline, and tangible results, making you a reliable ally in any crisis. While you might seem skeptical at first, it's only because you care deeply about the well-being of your friends and want to ensure everyone makes it out safely. You are brave enough to stand your ground even when you're outnumbered, and your skills with a slingshot or a basketball show your focus and precision. You are a realist who understands that actions have consequences.

Your realism can sometimes be mistaken for pessimism, and you may struggle to accept things that don't fit into your logical worldview. You can be quite stubborn when you think you're right, which can lead to friction with more impulsive friends. Once you're convinced of a cause, however, you are one of the most dedicated and fierce defenders anyone could ask for.

characters.name: Will Byers
characters.short_description: You are a sensitive, artistic soul with a quiet strength and a deep connection to your inner world.
characters.profile_text:
You are a deeply intuitive person who often feels things more intensely than those around you. Your creativity is your sanctuary, and you use art to process the world and your place within it. You have a gentle spirit and a remarkable capacity for endurance, having survived trials that would break most people. You value the simplicity of childhood friendships and the comfort of home, often acting as the emotional barometer for your group. You are the cleric who provides support and empathy, even when you are struggling with your own shadows.

You may feel like an outsider or struggle with the feeling that you're being left behind as life moves forward. Your tendency to internalize your pain can be a burden, and you might find it difficult to speak up for your own needs when everyone else is in crisis. However, your resilience and the support of your loved ones help you find your way back to the light. You are a survivor whose sensitivity is actually your greatest strength.

characters.name: Max Mayfield
characters.short_description: You are a fierce, independent spirit who hides a compassionate heart behind a tough exterior.
characters.profile_text:
You are someone who values independence and isn't afraid to challenge the status quo. You have a sharp tongue and a cool demeanor, but underneath that Mad Max persona is a person who cares deeply about justice and the people who have earned your trust. You are incredibly observant and often see through people's facades, preferring honesty over pleasantries. Your bravery is quiet but constant, whether you're standing up to a bully or facing down a literal monster. You are a trailblazer who doesn't need anyone's permission to be yourself.

You might push people away as a defense mechanism, finding it difficult to let others see your vulnerability or your grief. You tend to carry your burdens alone, fearing that letting people in will make you weak. However, once someone breaks through your walls, they find a fiercely loyal friend who will fight for them until the very end. You are a powerhouse of strength and grit, proving that being tough doesn't mean you don't have a heart.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your friend group is faced with a sudden, high-stakes crisis, what is your immediate instinctual role?

options.text: I take command, organizing a strategy and keeping everyone focused on the goal.
I act as the protector, using my strength to shield the most vulnerable members.
I analyze the situation logically, looking for technical solutions or scientific explanations.
I provide emotional support, ensuring no one feels alone or overwhelmed by fear.
I remain skeptical and grounded, questioning risks to ensure we don't act impulsively.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically process your deepest emotions or personal struggles?

options.text: I express them through creative outlets like art, music, or writing.
I keep them guarded behind a tough exterior, preferring to deal with things on my own.
I talk them through with my closest friends, seeking their advice and validation.
I struggle to put them into words, often letting my actions show how I feel instead.
I use humor and wit to deflect tension and keep the mood light.

baseline_questions.question_text: What quality do you value most in a potential best friend?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty; someone who will never give up on me no matter what.
Intellectual curiosity; someone I can explore new ideas and theories with.
Brutal honesty; someone who isn't afraid to tell me the truth, even if it's hard.
Shared history; someone who understands where I've been and where I'm coming from.
Reliability; someone who is practical and always shows up when they say they will.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments makes you feel most at peace?

options.text: A quiet, familiar room where I can focus on my hobbies or creative projects.
Outdoors on an adventure, exploring the unknown with a sense of wonder.
A bustling social gathering where I am the center of the action and planning.
A high-energy competitive setting where I can test my skills and focus.
Anywhere, as long as I am surrounded by the small group of people I trust most.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you react when you encounter something that challenges your understanding of reality?

options.text: I am fascinated and immediately want to learn everything about how it works.
I am cautious and defensive, prioritizing the safety of my group over curiosity.
I accept it as a new challenge to overcome, adapting my plans to fit the new rules.
I feel a deep, intuitive connection to it, even if it's frightening or strange.
I meet it with defiance, refusing to let it intimidate me or change who I am.

topics.display_name: Which SpongeBob Resident are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Bikini Bottom Resident Are You?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if your personality is more 'F.U.N.' or 'firmly grasp it'? Dive deep into the Pacific to see which member of the SpongeBob SquarePants gang truly matches your energy. Whether you're a karate-chopping scientist or a grumpy clarinetist, your nautical destiny awaits!

characters.name: SpongeBob SquarePants
characters.short_description: You are an eternal optimist who finds joy in the simplest tasks and values friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with an infectious enthusiasm that most people find both charming and slightly overwhelming. Your work ethic is unmatched, not because you seek status, but because you genuinely love what you do and take immense pride in every detail. You see the best in everyone, often to a fault, and your loyalty to your friends and employer is unwavering. While your sensitivity means you can be easily hurt by criticism, your resilience allows you to bounce back with a smile almost immediately. You are the heartbeat of your social circle, always ready with a kind word or a helping hand. Your imagination is your greatest tool, turning mundane chores into grand adventures. However, your naivety and a tendency to over-commit yourself to others' needs can be a pitfall. You might struggle with boundaries, often putting your own well-being aside to ensure everyone around you is happy. Your high energy can sometimes be misread as immaturity, but those who know you best understand it stems from a pure, kind-hearted nature that refuses to be dampened by the world.

characters.name: Patrick Star
characters.short_description: You are a laid-back soul who prioritizes leisure, loyalty, and the pursuit of life's simplest pleasures.
characters.profile_text: You possess a rare ability to remain completely unbothered by the stresses of the modern world. Your philosophy centers on relaxation and the enjoyment of the present moment, often finding profound satisfaction in doing absolutely nothing at all. While others are racing to get ahead, you are content to observe the world from your own unique, often literal perspective. Your loyalty to your closest friends is your greatest strength; you are the person who will stand by them through any absurdity without judgment. You find joy in the basics, like a good meal or a long nap, and your lack of pretense makes you a comforting presence to be around. Your lack of focus and occasional obliviousness can lead to misunderstandings or missed opportunities. You might find it difficult to handle complex responsibilities or long-term planning, preferring to follow your immediate impulses instead. However, your simplicity is also your shield, protecting you from the anxieties that plague more ambitious types. You remind everyone that life doesn't always have to be a race, and sometimes the best thing to do is just sit back and watch the world go by.

characters.name: Squidward Tentacles
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated individual with a refined taste for the arts who often feels misunderstood by a mediocre world.
characters.profile_text: You value peace, quiet, and the pursuit of creative excellence above all else. Whether it is music, painting, or dance, you believe that life should be lived with a certain level of dignity and aesthetic appreciation. You often find yourself surrounded by chaos that you didn't ask for, leading to a cynical exterior that masks a deep-seated desire for recognition and success. You are highly disciplined in your hobbies, even if the world doesn't always appreciate your specific brand of talent. You crave a life of luxury and intellectual stimulation, often feeling like a big fish in a very small, very annoying pond. Your tendency toward elitism and irritability can alienate those who genuinely care about you. You often focus so much on what is wrong with your environment that you forget to enjoy the small victories. While your standards are high, your pessimism can sometimes prevent you from taking the risks necessary to achieve the very greatness you crave. Deep down, you just want to be seen for the artist you are, but you must learn that a little bit of patience for others can go a long way in making your own life more harmonious.

characters.name: Sandy Cheeks
characters.short_description: You are a high-achieving adventurer who combines scientific intellect with physical prowess and a competitive spirit.
characters.profile_text: You are a powerhouse of energy and intelligence, always looking for the next challenge to conquer or the next mystery to solve. Your background likely involves a mix of rigorous academic study and intense physical training, making you a versatile individual who can handle almost any situation. You take great pride in your heritage and your personal accomplishments, and you aren't afraid to stand up for yourself or your friends when things get tough. You value logic and evidence, but you also have a wild side that craves adrenaline and exploration. You are the one people turn to when a problem requires both a sharp mind and a strong arm. Your competitive nature can sometimes turn friendly activities into intense rivalries, and your confidence can occasionally border on stubbornness. You might find it difficult to admit when you are wrong or when you need help, preferring to power through obstacles on your own. Learning to balance your drive for perfection with a bit of patience for those who aren't as fast or as smart as you is your ongoing journey. You are a true pioneer, always pushing the boundaries of what is possible.

characters.name: Mr. Krabs
characters.short_description: You are a shrewd, hardworking entrepreneur who is deeply motivated by financial security and the success of your business.
characters.profile_text: You have a keen eye for opportunity and a practical mind that excels at management and resource allocation. Your life is defined by your ambition and your desire to build a legacy, often through sheer grit and determination. You understand the value of a dollar better than anyone else, and you are willing to put in the long hours required to ensure your ventures thrive. Beneath your tough, money-minded exterior, you harbor a protective streak for those you consider family, though you might express it in unconventional ways. You are a natural leader who knows how to motivate a team, even if your methods are sometimes a bit rigorous. Your obsession with wealth and cost-cutting can lead to a reputation for being stingy or even exploitative. You risk losing sight of the people behind the numbers, sometimes prioritizing short-term gains over long-term relationships. Finding a balance between your fiscal goals and genuine generosity is essential to your personal growth. You are proof that hard work pays off, but you must remember that the richest life is one shared with others, not just one with the largest bank account.

characters.name: Plankton
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant, persistent visionary who refuses to let your small stature or past failures stop you from dreaming big.
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp, inventive mind and a relentless drive to achieve your goals, no matter how many times you have been thwarted. You are a master of strategy and technology, often spending your time crafting elaborate plans to gain an advantage in your field. Your ambition is fueled by a desire for power and respect, and you aren't afraid to challenge the status quo to get what you want. Despite your setbacks, your resilience is legendary; you are the ultimate underdog who keeps coming back with a new invention or a fresh perspective. You have a complex inner world and a partner who truly understands your genius, even when the rest of the world ignores you. Your ego and obsession with a single goal can blind you to the simpler joys of life and the value of collaboration. You often overcomplicate your plans, leading to self-sabotage when a more direct approach might have worked. Your tendency to view everyone as a rival can leave you feeling isolated, making it hard to form the genuine connections that might actually help you succeed. If you could learn to channel your brilliance into something constructive rather than competitive, there is no limit to what you could achieve.

baseline_questions.question_text: When starting your workday or a new project, what is your primary mindset?

options.text: I'm ready to give 110% and make sure everyone around me is happy!
I'm mostly thinking about when my next break or snack time is.
I'm wondering why I'm surrounded by such mediocrity and noise.
I'm focused on the technical challenges and proving my expertise.
I'm looking for the most efficient way to maximize my personal gains.
I'm plotting a way to finally surpass my rivals and achieve greatness.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to spend your ideal weekend?

options.text: Engaging in high-energy activities with every friend I know.
Doing absolutely nothing and enjoying the peace of my own home.
Attending a gallery opening or practicing a refined, artistic hobby.
Going on an intense outdoor adventure or conducting an experiment.
Checking on my assets and looking for new ways to build my legacy.
Working on a complex plan that will finally put me on top.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you consider your greatest personal strength?

options.text: My infectious positivity and unwavering loyalty to others.
My ability to stay completely relaxed and unbothered by stress.
My sophisticated taste and commitment to creative excellence.
My combination of high intelligence and physical toughness.
My practical mind for management and financial resourcefulness.
My relentless persistence and strategic, inventive brilliance.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically react when someone criticizes your work or ideas?

options.text: I take it to heart but immediately try to improve with a smile.
I probably didn't even notice they were talking to me.
I dismiss it as the opinion of someone who lacks my refinement.
I analyze the data to see if they're right, then fix the error.
I only care if their opinion is going to cost me money.
I assume they are trying to sabotage my genius and vow to succeed anyway.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these best describes your social philosophy?

options.text: The more friends, the merrier! I love being part of a big group.
I just need one loyal buddy who likes to do nothing with me.
I prefer my own company or the company of fellow intellectuals.
I value friends who can keep up with me and challenge my skills.
I keep my circle small and focus on those who help me thrive.
I find it hard to trust others; most people are just competition.
